title: [Clara] FireGuard Protection Services — V1 agent generated (ACC-001)
body:
**Account ID:** ACC-001
**Company:** FireGuard Protection Services
**Version:** v1
**Business Hours:** ['Monday', 'Tuesday', 'Wednesday', 'Thursday', 'Friday'] 08:00–17:00 America/Chicago
**Services:** commercial fire suppression, sprinkler systems, fire alarms, suppression systems for kitchens and server rooms

**Open Questions / Unknowns:**
- exact phone numbers for on-call dispatcher, lead tech, and Diana Cho
- how to handle false positives
- how to handle Spanish-speaking customers

**Next Steps:**
- [ ] Review generated agent spec
- [ ] Confirm transfer phone numbers
- [ ] Import spec into Retell dashboard
- [ ] Schedule test call

updates.message: Onboarding complete — v2 generated with 19 changes.
